title: Delosperma incomptum
taxonomy: Delosperma incomptum belongs to the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant family. This classification is due to its morphological and genetic characteristics, which place it within this specific family of succulent plants. Within the Aizoaceae family, Delosperma incomptum is further classified into the subfamily Ruschioideae. The Ruschioideae subfamily is a group of succulent plants that share similar characteristics, such as thick, fleshy leaves and stems. Delosperma incomptum is also classified as a genus within the family Aizoaceae, along with other similar species.
